done.summary: Add nondiscrimination testing for new plan year

Corrected loan repayment schedule calculation that was incorrectly handling biweekly payroll frequencies and causing off-by-one errors in payment counts

in_progress.description: Working on fixing edge case in compliance calculations for mid-year plan amendments. About 80% complete - just need to add tests and handle rollover edge case
Draft PR for 5500 filing deadline validation. Logic is complete but needs code review and integration tests before ready to merge
Reviewing and updating quarterly disclosure templates. About halfway through - completed fee disclosure updates, still need to address enrollment and distribution sections

up_next.description: Next priority is automating the safe harbor notice distribution process. Need to spike on template generation approach and timeline calculation logic
Code review request for eligibility service refactor. Needs thorough review as this is core logic affecting enrollment timing
